description_long: This jet ski features a streamlined, aerodynamic body with a sleek turquoise and black color scheme accented by a gray seat. The hull is robust and contoured for stability on water, with a pronounced bow and a slightly raised rear platform. The seat is ergonomically designed, appearing to accommodate one or two riders, and is finished in a smooth, padded material for comfort. The handlebars are compact and equipped with visible grips and control levers, positioned above a small dashboard area. The sides of the jet ski display subtle angular lines and vent-like details, enhancing its sporty appearance. The overall construction suggests a combination of durable plastic and metal components, typical for personal watercraft.
description: A sleek turquoise and black jet ski with a contoured gray seat, compact handlebars, and a streamlined, sporty design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, streamlined hull, and the ergonomic gray seat with turquoise and black body panels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed bow, compact handlebars, and the turquoise upper deck with black accents.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the seat profile, hull contours, and the angular design lines along the body.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the wide rear platform, the back of the seat, and the overall width of the jet ski.
attribute_handlebar_design: Short, straight handlebar with black grips and visible control levers, mounted above a small dashboard area.
attribute_seat_configuration: Single elongated seat with a contoured shape, gray in color, designed for one or two riders, and finished with a smooth, padded surface.
